title: Write table-driven invalid percentage tests
scenario: Invalid cases deserve precise tests too. Table-driven tests make it clear which inputs should fail.
instructions: Add a test that loops over invalid values and checks PercentageError::OutOfRange.

hints.body: Keep the Table-driven domain tests code active and add a test that loops over invalid values and checks PercentageError::OutOfRange.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Write table-driven invalid percentage tests is shown below.

completionExplanation: Write table-driven invalid percentage tests now extends the active Table-driven domain tests code with percentage invalid table tests. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
